name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.10.2 release hygiene, quality-gate hardening, and layout-host consistency
added: Release hygiene pass: current README, START_HERE, release notes, architecture, roadmap, SWOT, technical debt, and metrics docs now agree with VERSION and manifest.json

Quality-gate hardening: the full quality gate now refreshes metrics before the release artifact consistency check, while static smoke detects version/package structure issues and missing launcher/script references
Removed stale launcher artifacts from the release package to avoid broken entry points
Layout-host consistency: core Layout State Model now has a canonical panel registry that includes topWorkflow, diffAndOutput, and liveOutput
Save-policy naming cleanup: ask-on-exit is treated as a legacy alias and normalized to manual because close-time modal prompts are intentionally avoided
next_recommended: v3.10.3: stackable workspace groups for history, recovery, integrate, metrics, and output panels
v3.10.4: explicit layout save/discard/reset polish and profile selection
v3.10.5: dockable layout simulation with saved workspace profiles
v3.11.0: CI/CD and pull-request workflow integration
highlights: Turns v3.10.1 into a cleaner release-quality baseline before adding more layout complexity
Makes stale release artifacts visible through the quality gate instead of relying on manual review
Unifies the collapsible panel host vocabulary with the UI-independent layout model
Keeps layout save behavior honest: manual means explicit save, always means save on exit, never means do not persist layout changes
iteration_highlights: Updated docs and package metadata to v3.10.2
Updated static smoke checks for release/version/metrics consistency and missing launcher references
Regenerated metrics snapshot and Markdown report for v3.10.2
Replaced ask-on-exit as the visible save-policy option with manual, while retaining legacy normalization
Added canonical panel registry and legacy commandOutput -> liveOutput aliasing in GitLayoutState.psm1
